LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT YMCA OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION AND DENIED AS TO THE THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. (SEE MINUTES FOR FULL TEXT)
